title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A transit information team needs route reachability and stop-name prefix lookup. Deliver graph traversal, path reconstruction, dependency checks, and a normalized prefix index. Planned artifact: Deliver Route and Prefix Index with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate complete-tree shape to array indices and parent-child heap order.
Trace sift-up, sift-down, push, pop, replace, and heapify costs.
Add stable tie breakers without comparing unrelated payload objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
